headline: OpenAI restricts latest ChatGPT models amid cybersecurity review
body: OpenAI has limited access to its newest ChatGPT products, including GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.6, as part of a cybersecurity review process that restricts availability to approved customers and US-based users. For healthcare organizations, this fragmentation of model access creates immediate operational friction in AI implementation strategies, particularly for health systems evaluating enterprise-scale clinical workflow integration. Restrictions on model versions could delay deployment of AI tools for documentation automation, clinical decision support, and administrative tasks that many healthcare vendors now depend on. CIOs and consulting teams need to clarify licensing terms now and avoid building dependencies on restricted model versions that may face further limitations during ongoing compliance reviews.
